evidence: Candidate frontier uses compact cone markers with visible Finalist and Schiff legend entries.
Stress bucket order is 1-4 qtrs, 5-8 qtrs, 9-12 qtrs, 2024+, 2022-23, Annual.
Benchmark Pass KPI uses true 2/3 Schiff result rather than a misleading score.
Diagnostic matrix has styled pass, caution and fail cells.
Residual vs fitted is split into stream panels to avoid scale collapse.
Diagnostics KPIs show coverage, Durbin-Watson, adjusted R2 and heteroscedasticity pass.
Dumbbell comparison has separated Quarterly and Annual sections.
Horizon comparison shows PED, Light RUC and Heavy RUC in All Streams mode.
Decision Summary renders as a styled table.
Schiff vs Finalist MAPE separates Quarterly and Annual sections.
Benchmark Horizon Profiles show all three streams in All Streams mode.
Benchmark Summary renders as a styled table and uses pure Schiff rows only.
